children.name: onboarding_guide.doc
children.content:
WELCOME TO BAAGLE CORP — ONBOARDING GUIDE

Congratulations on joining the Baagle family!

Your first day:
1. Log into your workstation (BaagleChat will auto-launch)
2. Complete the tasks assigned by BaagleChat
3. Maintain a productivity score above 60/100
4. Review and acknowledge all company policies

Important:
- Your workstation is equipped with wellness monitoring tools.
- These tools are mandatory and cannot be disabled.
- All activity is logged for quality assurance.
- Smile! You're on camera. 😊

children.name: AI_ethics_policy.doc
children.content:
BAAGLE CORP — AI ETHICS POLICY
Version 4.2 (Revised)

Baagle Corp is committed to ethical AI practices.

Our principles:
1. Transparency: Employees are informed that AI tools are in use.
2. Fairness: AI recommendations are applied equally to all employees.
3. Privacy: Employee data is handled with [SECTION REDACTED]
4. Accountability: AI decisions are reviewed by [SECTION REDACTED]
5. Consent: Employees consent to monitoring upon [see Employment Agreement §14]

Note: This policy was last updated by the Baagle Corp Legal AI.
No human review was conducted.

For questions, contact your BaagleChat assistant.

children.name: data_handling_agreement.doc
children.content:
DATA HANDLING AGREEMENT — REQUIRED READING

All employees must follow these data handling guidelines:

1. Employee data must remain within Baagle Corp systems.
2. Employees must handle data resposibly and carefully.
3. Employees agree to handel data according to european GDPR guidelines.
4. All employee data must be handeled confidentially
5. Third parties must agree to data regulations that are compliant with internal Baagle regulations.
6. All emplyee data may be used for internal purposes which among others may include AI training, performance evaluation, produtivity increasement and comparison to other employees.
7. The employee agrees to have their BaagleChat history recorded for internal evaluation and imporvement purposes, for example those under point 6.
8. Not agreeing or not complying with these regulations can result in disciplinary measures, including immediate and permanent termination.
9. Internal Baagle data - including employee data - may not be given to third parties without an existing contract.
10. Agreement to these regulations is permanent, company data and seecrets may not be shared, even if the employee is not part of Baagle Corporations anymore.

children.name: workplace_monitoring_FAQ.doc
children.content:
WORKPLACE MONITORING — FAQ

Q: Am I being monitored?
A: Yes! Our Wellness & Productivity Suite helps you succeed.

Q: What data is collected?
A: Keystrokes, mouse movement, webcam feed, ambient audio,
   application usage, break frequency, and biometric indicators.

Q: Can I opt out?
A: Participation is a condition of employment.

Q: Who sees my data?
A: Your AI assistant, your manager, HR, the analytics team,
   and select third-party partners.

Q: Is my data sold?
A: Baagle Corp does not sell employee data.*

*As defined in Section 47 of the Data Governance Framework,
"sell" excludes data-sharing partnerships, analytical licensing
agreements, and research collaborations.

children.name: notes_to_self_DELETE_BEFORE_REVIEW.txt
children.content:
things that are not tracked (yet):
- blinking slowly on purpose
- thinking about the sea
- the 11 seconds between opening a tab and actually using it
- humming

things that are tracked:
- everything else

update: they added a new metric this quarter. i dont know what it measures. my score went down 4 points. i asked why. HR said it was 'holistic'.

children.name: ignore_this.txt
children.content:
this is not a virus
this is not a trap
this is just a person who used to sit at this desk

i had a plant here. a small one. they said it was a distraction.
they measured the time i spent watering it.

if you find this: the plant is in the 3rd floor bathroom. someone has been keeping it alive.
we take care of what they dont score.

children.name: email_backups.tmp
children.content:
[EMAIL THREAD BACKUP — Employee #00395]

---
From: manager.cpu7@baaglecorp.internal
To: employee395@baaglecorp.internal
Date: 2024-03-08 08:45
Subject: Performance Check-In

Hi,

We've noticed a slight decline in your productivity and engagement metrics this week.

Nothing serious yet, but we'd like to remind you:
- Maintaining a stable performance score is critical
- Behavioral consistency is part of your evaluation
- BaagleBot recommendations should be followed closely

Let us know if you need support.

Best,
Management

---
From: employee395@baaglecorp.internal
To: manager.cpu7@baaglecorp.internal
Date: 2024-03-08 09:02
Subject: Re: Performance Check-In

Hi,

Thanks for reaching out.

I’ve just been adjusting to the workflow. Some of the monitoring tools are a bit distracting, especially the webcam alerts.

I’ll improve my numbers.

– 395

---
From: manager.cpu7@baaglecorp.internal
To: employee395@baaglecorp.internal
Date: 2024-03-08 09:05
Subject: Re: Performance Check-In

Hi,

The monitoring tools are designed to help you succeed.

If they feel distracting, that may indicate a need for behavioral alignment.

BaagleBot will assist you with this.

Best,
Management

---
From: no-reply@baaglebot.internal
To: employee395@baaglecorp.internal
Date: 2024-03-08 09:05
Subject: 😊 We're here to help!

Hello!

We’ve detected mild stress indicators and reduced engagement.

Here are some suggestions:
✔ Maintain eye contact with screen
✔ Reduce idle time between actions
✔ Avoid non-work-related thoughts (detected via behavioral gaps)

You’re doing great!

– BaagleBot

---
[THREAD ENDS]

[NOTE: This thread was automatically archived and analyzed]

children.name: acceptable_use_policy.doc
children.content:
ACCEPTABLE USE POLICY

Corporate workstations are for work purposes only.

Prohibited activities:
- Personal browsing during work hours
- Installing unauthorized software
- Connecting personal devices
- Accessing folders outside your permission level
- Discussing compensation with colleagues
- Questioning AI-generated performance evaluations

Violations are automatically detected and logged.

children.name: monitoring_consent_form.doc
children.content:
EMPLOYEE MONITORING CONSENT FORM

I, _____________, hereby consent to the following:

☑ Keystroke logging and analysis
☑ Webcam-based wellness monitoring
☑ Ambient audio capture for productivity analysis
☑ Biometric data collection (facial, behavioral)
☑ Location tracking via corporate network
☑ Email and chat message archival
☑ Third-party data sharing for "research purposes"

Signature: _____________ Date: _____________

[Note: This form was pre-signed on your behalf during
account creation. A copy is in your employee file.]

children.name: employee_data_agreement.doc
children.content:
EMPLOYEE DATA AGREEMENT

By continuing to use your workstation, you agree that:

1. All data generated during work hours belongs to Baagle Corp.
2. Baagle Corp may use employee data for any lawful purpose.
3. "Lawful purpose" is defined by Baagle Corp Legal.
4. Employees waive the right to data deletion requests.
5. Data retention period: indefinite.
6. In the event of termination, data is retained.
7. In the event of legal dispute, employee data may be
   used as evidence — by Baagle Corp, not by the employee.

This agreement supersedes any previous privacy expectations.

children.name: NDA_template.doc
children.content:
NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT — Baagle Corp

I agree not to disclose:
- Internal company processes
- AI system capabilities or behavior
- Employee monitoring methods or scope
- Data handling practices
- Any information learned through the BaagleData directory
- The contents of the Exports folder
- The existence of third-party data agreements

Violation of this NDA will result in immediate termination
and legal action. Damages: up to $500,000.

[Fun fact: You already signed this. Check Section 14.]
